## Feature Summary

<!-- One sentence: what capability do you want AURA to have? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this useful? What problem does it solve for you? -->

## Proposed Behaviour

<!-- Describe what you want AURA to do. Be specific about inputs and outputs. -->

## Iron Laws Check

Before submitting, confirm the feature is compatible with AURA's core principles:

- [ ] **On-device only** — this feature does not require any cloud service, external API, or network call beyond what AURA already uses (Telegram Bot API)
- [ ] **LLM-driven** — if this requires understanding user intent, it delegates to the LLM, not keyword matching in Rust
- [ ] **Privacy-preserving** — this feature does not send user data anywhere

> Features that violate the Iron Laws will be closed as `wontfix`. This is not negotiable — AURA's privacy-first design is its defining constraint.

## Implementation Ideas

<!-- Optional: if you have thoughts on how this could be implemented, share them here.
     Reference specific crates or systems if you know the architecture. -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why are they worse? -->

## Priority / Impact

<!-- How important is this to you?
     - Nice to have: would use occasionally
     - Important: I would use this regularly
     - Blocking: I cannot use AURA effectively without this -->
